pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-008 (AI and Machine Learning/Knowledge) scores 0.419 composite (highest: NICE at 0.419) and is in_scope for the Knowledge Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 2. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Knowledge Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Include for edge domain (AI and Machine Learning) at composite 0.419. Edge domain inclusion threshold is ≥0.42 for Knowledge Manager.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain (AI and Machine Learning) inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.419 is below threshold. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI and Machine Learning KSA (composite 0.419)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Knowledge Manager job postings does not surface this AI and Machine Learning competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
